# solidfire_qos_policy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `qos` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--qos))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `qos_policy_id` (Number)
- `volume_ids` (List of Number)

<a id="nestedblock--qos"></a>
### Nested Schema for `qos`

Required:

- `burst_iops` (Number)
- `burst_time` (Number)
- `max_iops` (Number)
- `min_iops` (Number)

Optional:

- `curve` (Map of Number)
